programme.title: The Last Command
programme.desc: In this fact-based film legendary Texan Jim Bowie Sterling Hayden attempts to come to a nonviolent compromise with Mexican President Santa Anna J Carrol Naish but the negotiations soon turn sour Consuelo de Quesada Anna Maria Alberghetti a Mexican girl with close ties to Jim then warns him that Santa Anas men are planning to invade So Jim Davy Crockett Arthur Hunnicutt and a tiny crew of courageous Texans hide out in an abandoned mission awaiting the violent confrontation

programme.title: Broadway to Cheyenne
programme.desc: A cowboy detective goes up against a gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Snake In The Eagles Shadow
programme.desc: Snake In The Eagles Shadow

programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: As a posse of sheriff deputies pursue Dr Kimble on foot in the desert he is rescued by outlaw bikers who want to use him to settle a score with local law enforcement

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike investigates reports of a sea monster which is literally causing whales to leap into the air above the oceans surface

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike searches for the divers who are tapping top secret telephone communications along an underwater cable

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: A captain tortured for months by the Nazis gets back on flying status but suffers from flashbacks that endangers all the men working with him

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Julia assures Barnabas a letter exposing him will be turned over to the authorities if she or Maggie turn up dead but Willie is unconvinced that her ruse was successful Meanwhile Maggie is comforted by Sarahs doll

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: While attempting to warn Maggie Willie is shot by police and subsequently hospitalized so Barnabas pays Maggie a visit to ensure her memory hasnt returned

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: David refuses to believe Willie is guilty as his fear of Barnabas increases Meanwhile Julia tries to convinces Dr Woodard that Willie is the true culprit and Sarah is irrelevant

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Barnabas pays a threatening visit to David Later Sarah appears in Davids dream and reveals his cousins secret

programme.title: Prodigal Boxer 2
programme.desc: Prodigal Boxer 2

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies
programme.desc: Broadway partners Vicky Lane and Dan Christy have a tiff over Christys womanizing Jealous Vicky takes up with her old flame and former dance partner Victor Price and Dans career takes a nosedive In hopes of rekindling their romance and getting Vicky back on the boards with him Dan follows her to a ritzy resort in the Canadian Rockies where she and Victor are about to open their new act But things get complicated when Dan wakes after a bender to find that hes hired an outlandish Latin secretary Rosita Murphy which makes Vicky think hes just up to his old tricks again

programme.title: Rim of the Canyon
programme.desc: ene Autrys stolen horse turns up in a ghost town where Gene goes after he is left stranded during a stagecoach race

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A tormented young artist freaks when his latest cartoon The Phantom leaps from the page to do his bidding Meanwhile after undergoing a traumatic experience a claustrophobic is driven to the brink of madness

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: After the death penalty is abolished an executioner continues his former job through freelancing

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy woman makes the mistake of murdering her husband while an escaped mental patient dressed in a Santa Claus outfit is on the loose

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Down on his luck yuppie Richard Shepard crashes at his buddy Carls swanky seaside abode after he gets thrown out of his home by his fed-up wife Eleanor Richard develops a strong bond with a mysterious large white dog who not only becomes his new best friend but also kills anyone who angers Richard

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Struggling writer Jeffrey Hunt fakes his own death in order to achieve literary immortality His unfaithful wife Debby has been having an adulterous affair with Jeffreys publicist and best friend Tony Lynch Debby and Tony try to make Jeffreys staged death real but the plan backfires

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric is stranded by a thunderstorm in an isolated log lodge with six other people who are being killed off one by one

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Knight 321
programme.desc: Knight 321

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: The spirit of a dead voodoo priestess strikes out at three voodoo Legbas to get their power and resurrect herself and take revenge on the fourth Legba who killed her

programme.title: The Return
programme.desc: In New Mexico an alien spacecraft abducts two young children and an old man 25 years later the children are returned as adults to the same town now beset by strange cattle mutilations

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper believes that Gilligan has found The Eye of the Idol which gives him three wishes before sundown However the Professor believes it is just a silly superstition and just an ordinary cats eye

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A blow to the head gives the Skipper amnesia The Professor tries to cure him through hypnosis but he winds up believing that the other castaways are Japanese soldiers

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa gets into an egg feud with a rival egg salesman He makes money but the rest of the family suffers when Hassie wants to date the rivals son

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Luke need a new gun for a shooting contest Kate needs a new dress to be inducted into the PTA Theres just enough money in the cookie jar for one of them

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is moonlighting as a private investigator when cutbacks hit CONTROL

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS can send out sonic booms at will and threatens New York City with one

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: The college students who hire BJ to haul equipment for a talent show secretly plan to his rig as a gambling casino

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol has sprained her wrist so Wilbur hires Velma a fantastic cook She even serves carrot pizzas to Ed When Velma announces that shes leaving to find a boyfriend Ed calls her on the phone and pretends to be a local secret admirer

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur hires a bumbling handyman to fix up the house in anticipation of a visit from Home Beautiful Magazine and Ed wants new shoes

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: There seems to be a traitor in the escaped prisoner pipeline and Hogan has to find him by following the escape route

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Carter receives a Dear John letter and wants to join the rest of the prisoners that escape and go home

programme.title: Mchale 306
programme.desc: Mchale 306

programme.title: Mchale 401
programme.desc: Mchale 401

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Part 3 of Sea Maneuvers has Carter challenging the Petty Chief Officer to a boxing match not knowing the Chief was the Fleet Champ with 37 knockouts

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer helps a recruit smuggle his girlfriend into the barracks

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: The Scarlet and The Black
programme.desc: Vatican efforts led by Monsignor Hugh OFlaherty to save Allied POWs and downed Allied airmen as the Nazis invade Rome

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A German plot to kidnap Sir Winston Churchill unfolds at the height of World War II

programme.title: Rocky and Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky and Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: A man claiming to be the Dukes cousin from England Gaylord Duke asks Uncle Jesse for a 30000 advance to pay off the taxes for a piece of land he claims to have inherited But theres more to Gaylords story that he isnt exactly telling

programme.title: Hercules 206
programme.desc: Hercules 206

programme.title: Earth The Final Conflict
programme.desc: Boone tries to find out who murdered his wife

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: When a severe heat wave strikes the aliens cut off the citys water supply and exploit a local reverend to drive humans into worshipping the Morthren Eternal

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Trapped in a cave with Alec and facing death by suffocation Arcane reviews his life in a grand soliloquy He can lie to others but ultimately can he lie to himself

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: 40 years ago a plane carrying valuable Egyptian antiquities and a mummy crashed in the swamp Arcane supports an expedition to find it but his interest is far more than financial

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans encounter a miles-long ark from the planet Daria where the inhabitants have a very distinctive class separation

programme.title: Prophecy
programme.desc: A government health inspector is dispatched to assess the damage a logging company is causing to a patch of forest claimed by Native Americans and comes face to face with true terror wreaking havoc in the woods

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Cody enlists the help of self-proclaimed preacher Gideon Poole but regrets it when he learns the truth about him

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A field worker tries to get a job in San Francisco and he does but moments later there is a raid by the immigration service and officer is killed

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: IMF agent Rollin Hand impersonating mobster Frank Wayne has a counter-proposal for the other mob bosses He says hell undergo plastic surgery to look like a different man In comes Cinnamon In reality she is undoing Rollins makeup; she can afford no mistakes because the other mob bosses are watching the entire time Meanwhile a doctor working for the IMF is performing plastic surgery on the real Wayne -- making him to look like Rollin All of this is part of Phelpss plan aimed at getting access to Waynes records But Phelps himself will face an attempted hit before the mission can be concluded

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An old Vaudevillian finds 9 one thousand dollar bills on the street He uses one to buy his friends drinks at a dive The next morning a private detective claims that the money was lost by a big time gambler and pressures him to give it back he does and discovers that the detective was a con man

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: When a man is arrested for possession of illegal pills he provides information that may help him at trial The information leads Friday and Gannon to a home used as a pill making factory and the detectives must try to locate the man running the factory

programme.desc: On a train ride Audra falls seriously ill and the only doctor available to treat her has a band of ruffians in pursuit for revenge

programme.title: Godzilla Vs The Sea Monster
programme.desc: James Rolfe reviews the 1966 film Ebirah Horror of the Deep dubbed Godzilla vs the Sea Monster by him directed by Jun Fukuda It features a film in which Godzilla was added as a late addition He then battles a giant crab

programme.title: Arena
programme.desc: In a huge space arena fighters from all over the galaxy come to battle each other in hopes of claiming victory While most warriors are of various alien species Steve Armstrong Paul Satterfield is a rarity -- a human who aspires to compete in the games Training with his friend Shorty Hamilton Camp and encouraged by the lovely promoter Quinn Claudia Christian Steve has a shot at the intergalactic championship but plenty of extraterrestrial brawlers are eager to take him down

programme.title: Escape Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Three apes travel back in time after Earths destruction and land on earth in the 70s They acquire celebrity status after revealing that they can talk but things take a turn for the worse soon

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Project Metalbeast
programme.desc: In 1974 an unhinged CIA agent injects himself with the werewolf blood he found After a killing spree his body is put in suspended animation then thawed out 20 years later by his crazy boss and a team of unsuspecting doctors

programme.title: Meteor
programme.desc: When USA detects a gigantic meteor moving towards Earth their only hope to save mankind is to use an illegal nuclear weapon satellite However they soon realize that they cannot do it alone

programme.title: Miracle of the White Stallions
programme.desc: In 1945 the fate of Viennas famous Lipizzaner stallions hangs into balance American general Patton could save them but first he asks to see them perform

programme.title: The Black Tent
programme.desc: In the African desert a British soldier romances the native chiefs daughter and helps the tribe fight off a Nazi attack

programme.title: Attack Force Nam
programme.desc: A group of Australian commandos launch a secret mission against Japanese forces in World War II

programme.title: Badge of the Assassin
programme.desc: Three black revolutionaries gun down two New York City police officers The subsequent investigation puts a white assistant DA and a black police detective on the trail of the killers that leads from New York to San Francisco and down to New Orleans

programme.title: 315 the Moment of Truth
programme.desc: The Cobras a vicious street gang rule an embattled high school with their violent brand of terror But theyre headed for a showdown when an ex-gang-member-gone-good challenges their brutal reign

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Alexander Shlemenko v. Brandon Halsey

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Sam Kwasman Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.title: The Annalisa Guidone Interview
programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind
